description:
A premium, accessibility-first toolkit engineered by Accessible Tech Labs India (ATL India). 
This suite empowers NVDA users with a high-performance System Health Dashboard, an automated System Cleaner, and a customizable Quick Launcher for files and URLs. 
Featuring dedicated modules for Power Management and Alarms, every tool is optimized for a seamless, interference-free workflow. 
Built to enhance productivity without compromising native screen reader commands.
